markdownRemark.html:
Awesome Yew

A curated list of awesome things related to Yew.

Yewstars15.7k is a modern Rust framework inspired by Elm and React for creating multi-threaded frontend apps with WebAssembly.

Contributions welcome! Read the contribution guidelines first.

Contents

  • Official
  • Projects
  • Templates
  • Crates
    • Component Libraries
    • Components
    • Utils
    • Wasm
  • Tooling
  • Articles
  • Books
  • Alternatives
  • Related lists

Official

  • Yewstars15.7k - Rust / WebAssembly framework for building client web apps.
  • Live demo - A todomvc demo.
  • Examples - Smaller examples included in official repo.
  • API Docs - Docs on docs.rs.
  • Website - Official website.
  • Chatroom - It is pretty active and is a great place to ask questions.
  • Reddit - Dedicated Sub Reddit.
  • Financial Contribute - Become a financial contributor and help us sustain our community.
  • Yewtifystars84 - Vuetify components for Yew Framework.

Projects

  • Realworld examplestars268 - Exemplary real world app built with Rust + Yew + WebAssembly.
  • webapp.rsstars1.7k - A web application completely written in Rust, frontend is built with Yew.
  • Rust-Full-Stackstars776 - Easily testable and working Rust codes with blog posts to explain them.
  • Bucket Questionsstars2 - A webapp written entirely in Rust for a dumb party game.
  • web-view todomvc desktop appstars78 - Demo how to use yew for a todomvc that compiles to WebAssembly and is bundled as a lightweight(~2mb) desktop app by web-viewstars1.6k, as an alternative to Electron, web-viewstars1.6k also has a demo.
  • yew-react-examplestars37 - This project shows how to create a web app using a React component inside a Yew component.
  • Kirkstars19 - Just A Rust WebAssembly Blog.
  • rust-async-wasm-demostars21 - Toy project to learn Rust and async that can be deployed to the web.
  • karaoke-rsstars100 - A simple, network enabled karaoke player in Rust.
  • I Love Hue! (rs)stars9 - A clone of the mobile game I Love Hue in Yew (Rust).
  • yew-styles-pagestars62 - This is an initial project of a framework style for yew.
  • caniuse.rsstars90 - Rust feature search.
  • Rust electron yew demostars14 - An example of building a Rust based web app (Yew) into a native app using electron.
  • covplotstars8 - Live graphs of worldwide CoVID-19 data.
  • Tanoshistars12 - Tachiyomi-like web manga reader. Front-end for tanoshi.
  • Minesweeperstars12 - Minesweeper built with Rust, Yew and WebAssembly.
  • Freecellstars4 - A patience game written in Rust and Yew.
  • Daydreamstars49 - A small Matrix web client written in Rust.
  • Yew-WebRTC-Chatstars71 - A simple WebRTC chat made with Yew.
  • Yew Fullstack Boilerplatestars24 - Highly opinionated boilerplate for creating full stack applications with Rust.
  • Chord Quizstars10 - Practice recognizing chords in this Rust/Yew/WebAssembly app.
  • RustMartstars201 - Single Page Application (SPA) written using Rust, Wasm and Yew.
  • DevAndDevstars32 - A website where developers can find pair-programming partners. Written in Rust, Yew frontend.
  • yew-octiconsstars10 - An easy interface for using Octicons in Yew projects.
  • Pipestars23 - This is a Rust / Wasm client web app which is a task control center.
  • note-to-yewstars2 - Convert your markups into Yew macro online, which is also made by Yew.
  • ASCII-Hangmanstars4 - Configurable Hangman game for children with ASCII-art rewarding.
  • dotdotyewstars3 - Dot-voting using Yew, with Rust powering the backend API.
  • wasm-2048stars124 - 2048 game implemented with Rust and Yew and compiled to Wasm.
  • website-wasmstars18 - My personal website written in Rust via Yew/Wasm.
  • KeyPressstars1 - A Rust WebAssembly Website example for practising english for chinese.
  • yew-train-ticketstars2 - A Rust WebAssembly Webapp example basing Yew newest hooks and functional API, the code style is extremely like React Function Component.
  • yew-d3-examplestars0 - Showing a d3 chart with Yew.
  • Oxfeedstars0 - A feed reader written in Rust with a Yew frontend.
  • Flow.erstars25 - A notebook app integrated with todo lists utility. Developed with Rust, WebAssembly, Yew and Trunk.
  • Fullstack-Ruststars1 - A Full Stack Rust application (Connect5 game) with Actix-web, Yew, Bulma CSS and Diesel.
  • Sea_battlestars0 - A simple example of a sea battle game. Rust + Yew.

Templates

  • Create Yew Appstars75 - Set up a modern Yew web app by running one command, npx create-yew-app my-app.
  • yew-wasm-pack-templatestars97 - A template for starting a Yew project to be used with wasm-pack.
  • yew-wasm-pack-minimalstars82 - A minimal template for starting a Yew project using wasm-bindgen and wasm-pack.
  • yew-parcel-templatestars75 - Awesome Yew with Yew-Router and Parcel application.

Crates

Component Libraries

  • yew-mdcstars10 - Material Design Components for the Yew framework.
  • muicss-yewstars14 - MUI-CSS Components for Yew framework.
  • yew-bulmastars8 - A Rust library providing components based on the bulma css library for projects using Yew.
  • yew-material-componentsstars42 - Yew material components.
  • Yewprintstars184 - Port of blueprintjs.com to Yew.
  • ybcstars64 - A Yew component library based on the Bulma CSS framework.
  • patternfly-yewstars20 - Patternfly components for Yew.
  • yew-featherstars2 - Feather Icons components for Yew.
  • tailwind-yew-builderstars11 - Builds Tailwind CSS for Yew using docker-compose. Also supports Trunk.
  • yew-componentsstars10 - Material Design Components for the Yew framework.
  • material-yewstars60 - Yew wrapper for Material Web Components.

Components

  • Yew Formstars54 - Components to simplify handling forms with Yew.
  • yew-component-sizestars1 - A Yew component that emits events when the parent component changes width/height.
  • yew-virtual-scrollerstars0 - A Yew component for virtual scrolling / scroll windowing.

Utils

  • yew-statestars60 - Ergonomic shared state for Yew components with optionally persistent local and session storage.
  • reacty_yewstars28 - Generate Yew components from React components via Typescript type definitions.
  • styled-yewstars17 - CSS in Rust, similar to styled-components, but for Yew.

Wasm

  • wasm-bindgenstars4.2k - Facilitating high-level interactions between WebAssembly modules and JavaScript.
  • stdwebstars3.1k - Provides Rust bindings to the Web APIs and to allow a high degree of interoperability between Rust and JavaScript.

Tooling

  • wasm-packstars3.4k - Your favorite Rust -> WebAssembly workflow tool.
  • wasm-pack-actionstars24 - Github action to install wasm-pack by downloading the executable to speed up CI/CD.
  • wasm-bindgen-actionstars6 - Github action to install wasm-bindgen by downloading the executable to speed up CI/CD.
  • cargo-webstars1k - A Cargo subcommand for the client-side Web.
  • Trunkstars467 - Build, bundle & ship your Rust Wasm application to the web.
  • wabtstars3.4k - The WebAssembly Binary Toolkit, for the wasm-strip and wasm-objdump tools to reduce .wasm file size.
  • binaryenstars4.8k - Compiler infrastructure and toolchain library for WebAssembly, for the wasm-opt tool to reduce .wasm file size.

Articles

  • Let's Build a Rust Frontend with Yew
  • How to use Rust Yew
  • How to use a modal in Rust
  • How to use routers in Rust Frontend
  • How to modulize your Rust Frontend
  • How to use NPM packages with Rust Frontend
  • How to use markdown with Rust Frontend
  • Fullstack Rust with Yew
  • How to write Full Stack Rust code
  • How to render a YouTube vlog with Rust Yew fetch API
  • How to render blog posts with Rust Yew mounted API
  • A Web Application completely in Rust
  • Yew - Rust & WebAsse-frontend framework

Books

  • The WebAssembly Book - Working with the web and producing .wasm files.
  • The wasm-bindgen Guide - How to bind Rust and JavaScript APIs.
  • The wasm-pack Guide - How to build and work with rust-generated WebAssembly.
  • Programming WebAssembly with Rust - Includes a chapter Advanced JavaScript Integration with Yew on creating an app with Yew.
  • Creative Projects for Rust Programmers - Chapter 5, Creating a Client-Side WebAssembly App Using Yew.

Alternatives

Yew team love to share ideas with other projects and believe we can all help each other reach the full potential of this exciting new technology.

  • Dracostars284 - A Rust library for building client side web applications with WebAssembly.
  • Percystars1.6k - A modular toolkit for building isomorphic web apps with Rust + WebAssembly.
  • Sauronstars1.2k - Sauron is an HTML web framework for building web-apps.
  • Seedstars1.9k - A Rust framework for creating web apps.
  • Smithystars289 - A framework for building WebAssembly apps in Rust.

Related lists

  • Awesome Rust and WebAssemblystars421 - A list of awesome Rust and WebAssembly projects, libraries, tools, and resources.
  • Awesome WebAssemblystars5.8k - Collection of awesome things regarding WebAssembly ecosystem.
  • Awesome Ruststars20.6k - A curated list of Rust code and resources.
